title: RENT ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: SIUSLAW AREA RESOURCE CENTER RENT ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides rent assistance to prevent homelessness. Assistance is based on available funding and is not guaranteed. 1536 W 12th Street Florence, OR 97439 Eligibility: Income restrictions. Must be unstably housed or at imminent risk of homelessness to qualify. Hours: Monday-Thursday 10am-3:30pm, Friday 10am-4pm Email (541) 997-2816 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (541) 997-2816 Housing Manager Kevin Furber [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information. All assistance requires a personal visit with an advocate to determine the circumstances of the emergency situation and past assistance provided. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: -Identification: Valid State ID or Driver's License -Income: Documentation of all sources of income for the last 30 days. This can include employment paystubs, verification of cash payments for employment, SSI, TANF, other benefit letters, alimony payments, etc. -Housing status: Notices, letters, or other documentation that shows arrears, late payments, or additional proof of risk of homelessness. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, American Sign Language AREA SERVED: Zip codes 97412, 97430, 97439, 97453, 97480, 97490, and 97493 SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm, closed major holidays Services: Rent Payment Assistance Rent Payment Assistance * Homelessness Issues Rental Deposit Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - HOMELESSNESS PREVENTION HOUSING/SHELTER - LANE COUNTY COORDINATED ENTRY ACCESS POINTS MATERIAL GOODS - COMMUNITY ASSISTANCE SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - DOMESTIC VIOLENCE SUPPORT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SIUSLAW AREA RESOURCE CENTER
